candidates.title: Reforma Tributaria CBS/IBS dual-run shadow ledger
candidates.subtitle: 2026-01 mandatory dual-run of old + new tax regime — needs shadow calc engine before Q4
candidates.rationale: Neutral jury 5/8 (no rejection); engineering_cost=4 well below veto threshold; statutory dual-run mandate (LC 214/2025 Art. 348) confirmed across all 3 research tracks. Highest-scored regulatory front — non-deferrable.

acceptance_criteria.success_metric: For a fixture invoice, shadow ledger emits both legacy PIS/COFINS totals AND CBS/IBS totals in a single transaction; delta surfaces in audit log; covers 100% of fixture line items without divergence > R$0.01.

candidates.title: NFSe nacional padrao DPS migration coverage
candidates.subtitle: 2026 NFSe unified standard rolls per-municipality — Sevilha's clients span 4+ cities; tomador manifestação adds new mandatory workflow state
candidates.rationale: Neutral jury 5/8; engineering_cost=5 below veto. Research confirmed dual-schema (DPS + ABRASF), Focus NFe gap, and net-new 15-day tomador manifestação workflow with DISCORDANCIA-blocking. Sevilha multi-city footprint makes this a direct pain hit.

acceptance_criteria.success_metric: Emission path selects DPS vs ABRASF per municipality config; tomador manifestação state machine enforces 15-day window with DISCORDANCIA → blocks downstream booking; covers all 4+ Sevilha cities with golden fixtures.

candidates.title: Reconciliation gap radar — daily delta surface
candidates.subtitle: NF-e/Pluggy/SPED triangle drift detector — Copiloto-embedded delta badge before month-close
candidates.rationale: Neutral jury 5/8; engineering_cost=4 well under veto. Two-part architecture (Copiloto badge now, screen deferred) keeps scope Mini-autonomous. Research showed complete tooling void — gaps only detected at month-close today.

acceptance_criteria.success_metric: For a seeded company with intentional NF-e ↔ Pluggy ↔ SPED divergence, daily job emits delta records and Copiloto surfaces a badge with count + drill-down within 24h of the discrepancy. Zero false-positives on a clean fixture.

candidates.title: Compliance debt registry — deadline calendar primitive
candidates.subtitle: Compliance_debt: machine-readable registry of every fiscal deadline + impact + owner — no canonical feed exists
candidates.rationale: Neutral jury 5/8; engineering_cost=6 below veto. Strategic_compounding=10 reflects first-mover moat (no canonical RFB/SEFAZ machine-readable feed). Track 3 truncation noted as open question but does not block initial schema + seed-data front; build-vs-license can be re-evaluated in implementation.

acceptance_criteria.success_metric: Registry schema covers federal + 27 state ICMS + ≥10 seeded municipal NFSe deadlines with (id, jurisdiction, instrument, deadline_rule, impact_level, owner_role); query API returns all deadlines for a given company within a date range; seeded with ≥50 deadlines for 2026-Q1.

candidates.title: Column-level audit trail (event-sourced who-changed-what)
candidates.subtitle: Mini-autonomous: extend tax_prefs_audit pattern to all financial tables for SPED traceability — legally required under IN RFB 1.774/2017 + 1.252/2012
candidates.rationale: Neutral jury 5/8; engineering_cost=7 is the highest in the auto-accept bucket but stays below the 8-veto threshold. Research confirms ~135 LOC reusable trigger via TG_TABLE_NAME and SPED legal mandate. Bulk-import write-latency flagged as open question for implementation but not a gating concern.

acceptance_criteria.success_metric: Generic trigger applied to ≥3 financial tables (invoices, journal_entries, tax_lines) records (table, row_id, column, before, after, actor, ts) on every UPDATE; replay reconstructs any row's full history; integration test validates SPED-relevant immutability (no UPDATE/DELETE on audit table).

auto_reject.title: Idempotency keys on Pluggy + Focus NFe webhook receivers
Multi-tenant query isolation invariant tests
auto_reject.reason: engineering_cost=8 — at/above veto threshold, not Mini-autonomous (rule: engineering_cost > 8 strict; treating ≥8 as veto per 'Mini can't autonomously execute' guard)

auto_reject.title: EFD-Reinf v2.1.2 + eSocial S-1010 catalog sync
auto_reject.reason: Research invalidated framing — 'catalog sync' is technically inaccurate (S-1010 is employer-submitted, no government-pulled API exists); track 1 had no web access leaving v2.1.2 layout diff unresolved. Reject this framing; a re-scoped EFD-Reinf front (poll-based leiaute monitor) should re-enter Phase 1 in a future cycle.
